affected: simple-git >=3.15.0 <3.32.3; current lock 3.30.0 is affected and bundled in dist
description: Case-insensitive protocol.allow config bypass in simple-git unsafe-operation blocking enables RCE.

component: Vitest API server / browser-to-localhost dev server
description: Malicious website can reach a listening Vitest API server and trigger remote code execution.

affected: rollup >=4.0.0 <4.59.0; current 4.55.1 via Vite/Vitest is affected
description: Path traversal in Rollup 4 can write files outside the intended output directory.

component: simple-git option parser / git argv boundary
affected: simple-git <3.32.0; current lock 3.30.0 is affected and bundled in dist
description: Option parsing bypass allows attacker-controlled values to execute arbitrary git/native commands.

component: Vite dev server fs deny checks

affected: vite 6.x/7.x below 6.4.2/7.3.2/8.0.5; current 7.3.1 via Vitest is affected

ReDoS via extglob quantifiers in glob patterns.
